sourceRef: tip:Documenting exceptions so future you trusts them

slides.headline: Automate Certifications, Track Compliance
slides.body: Streamline GIBill and Chapter 33 processes for your students.

slides.headline: Document student veteran data
slides.body: Centralize student veteran information for accurate documentation.

slides.headline: Generate automated letters
slides.body: Automate the generation of letters for certification requests.

slides.headline: Track compliance
slides.body: Monitor student veteran compliance with VA education benefits.

slides.headline: Support student veterans
slides.body: Provide comprehensive support for student veterans through the certification process.

slides.headline: Compliance dashboard
slides.body: View a comprehensive dashboard to track all student veteran certifications.

outline.caption: Streamline your certification processes with VASCO Assistant Pro. Document student veteran data, generate automated letters, track compliance, and provide comprehensive support. Learn more at aimilitaryservices.com.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5 of 5, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
